languages.text: {n}Полковник движется плавно, аккуратно, в каждом движении скрыт потенциальный удар, но вы оказываетесь хитрее. Как только он шагает вперед, ваш нож уже ожидает его там.{/n}
{n}The colonel moves smoothly, precisely, hiding a potential strike in every move, but you're one step ahead. As he lunges forward, he finds your blade already waiting for him.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Полковник движется плавно, аккуратно, в каждом движении скрыт потенциальный удар, но вы оказываетесь хитрее. Как только он шагает вперед, ваш нож уже ожидает его там.{/n}

languages.text: {n}上校的动作流畅而精准，每一步都暗藏杀机，但你总是快他一步。当他向前猛冲时，你的刀刃早已在那里等着他了。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel moves smoothly, precisely, hiding a potential strike in every move, but you're one step ahead. As he lunges forward, he finds your blade already waiting for him.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}上校的动作流畅而精准，每一步都暗藏杀机，但你总是快他一步。当他向前猛冲时，你的刀刃早已在那里等着他了。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Albay pürüzsüz, kesin hareket ediyor. Her hamlesinde potansiyel bir saldırı saklasa da ondan bir adım ileride kalmayı başarıyorsun. İleri atıldığında, bıçağının onu çoktan beklediğini fark ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel moves smoothly, precisely, hiding a potential strike in every move, but you're one step ahead. As he lunges forward, he finds your blade already waiting for him.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Albay pürüzsüz, kesin hareket ediyor. Her hamlesinde potansiyel bir saldırı saklasa da ondan bir adım ileride kalmayı başarıyorsun. İleri atıldığında, bıçağının onu çoktan beklediğini fark ediyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le colonel se meut avec adresse et fluidité, paré à chaque instant à porter un coup, mais vous savez anticiper. Il porte une estocade, mais votre lame la pare sans effort.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel moves smoothly, precisely, hiding a potential strike in every move, but you're one step ahead. As he lunges forward, he finds your blade already waiting for him.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le colonel se meut avec adresse et fluidité, paré à chaque instant à porter un coup, mais vous savez anticiper. Il porte une estocade, mais votre lame la pare sans effort.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El coronel se mueve con fluidez y precisión, ocultando un ataque en potencia en cada movimiento, pero estás un paso por delante. Cuando se lanza hacia ti, encuentra tu cuchillo esperándole.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel moves smoothly, precisely, hiding a potential strike in every move, but you're one step ahead. As he lunges forward, he finds your blade already waiting for him.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El coronel se mueve con fluidez y precisión, ocultando un ataque en potencia en cada movimiento, pero estás un paso por delante. Cuando se lanza hacia ti, encuentra tu cuchillo esperándole.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Colonel bewegt sich geschmeidig und präzise, um einen möglichen Angriff zu verbergen, aber du bist ihm einen Schritt voraus. Als er sich auf dich stürzt, wird er bereits von deiner Klinge erwartet.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel moves smoothly, precisely, hiding a potential strike in every move, but you're one step ahead. As he lunges forward, he finds your blade already waiting for him.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Colonel bewegt sich geschmeidig und präzise, um einen möglichen Angriff zu verbergen, aber du bist ihm einen Schritt voraus. Als er sich auf dich stürzt, wird er bereits von deiner Klinge erwartet.{/n}

languages.text: {n}大佐は、あらゆる動きに潜在的な攻撃を隠しながら、滑らかに、正確に動く。しかし、あなたは一歩先を行く。大佐が突進すると、あなたの刀がすでに彼を待っていた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel moves smoothly, precisely, hiding a potential strike in every move, but you're one step ahead. As he lunges forward, he finds your blade already waiting for him.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}大佐は、あらゆる動きに潜在的な攻撃を隠しながら、滑らかに、正確に動く。しかし、あなたは一歩先を行く。大佐が突進すると、あなたの刀がすでに彼を待っていた。{/n}
